---
title: "EpiModel Gallery"
listing:
  id: gallery-listing
  contents: examples/*/index.qmd
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  sort:
    - "order"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

A collection of template examples for extending [EpiModel](https://www.epimodel.org/) to model infectious disease dynamics over networks. Each example provides annotated code, pre-rendered output, and downloadable standalone scripts.

Browse by category or follow the sidebar for a guided learning path from fundamentals to advanced topics.

::: {#gallery-listing}
:::
